name: tasks_v1
description: Schema for extracting actionable tasks from documents like meeting transcripts, notes, emails, and other content.

tasks.description: List of actionable tasks extracted from the content

title.description: A clear, actionable task title that starts with a verb when possible

description.description: Detailed description of what needs to be done

priority.description: Task priority level based on urgency and importance mentioned in the content

assignee.description: Name of the person assigned to this task, if mentioned

due_date.description: Due date or deadline in YYYY-MM-DD format, if mentioned

start_date.description: Suggested start date in YYYY-MM-DD format, if applicable

context.description: Original quote or context from the source document where this task was identified

summary.description: Brief summary of the document and the types of tasks identified
